item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 10min Exciting debutant!
Ombudsman's full-sister SYNCHRONICITY makes her first start at @N
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 10min Exciting debutant!
Ombudsman's full-sister SYNCHRONICITY makes her first start at @NewburyRacing later today 0:11 Tap here to view the racecard! De attheraces.com 3 6 601

item.title:
BallinrobeRaces: Racing TV reposteó Ballinrobe Races @BallinrobeRaces · 28min Today's meeting at Ballinrobe has been cancelled
Following
item.description:
Racing TV reposteó Ballinrobe Races @BallinrobeRaces · 28min Today's meeting at Ballinrobe has been cancelled
Following an inspection earlier this morning, the course at Ballinrobe has been deemed unfit for racing, and the meeting scheduled for today, April 17th, has been cancelled.
IHRB Clerk of the Course, Shane Ryder stated “Following Mostrar más 2 1 1 mil

item.title: Rhys_N_Williams: Diarmuid Nolan reposteó Rhys Williams @Rhys_N_Williams · 18min Five selections for my @gambling_com column today at Ay
item.description: Diarmuid Nolan reposteó Rhys Williams @Rhys_N_Williams · 18min Five selections for my @gambling_com column today at Ayr, Newbury and Exeter. Some price changes since time of writing but lowest acceptable still just about available on those that have shortened De gambling.com 2 2 579

item.title: ChrisPoole___: Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 11min 22.5 min advert breaks and Chris Martin , worrying trends … Cita The Touchline | 𝐓 @T
item.description:
Chris Poole @ChrisPoole___ · 11min 22.5 min advert breaks and Chris Martin , worrying trends … Cita The Touchline | 𝐓 @TouchlineX · 1h 𝗡𝗘𝗪: For the first time in history, The World Cup Final will have a halftime show.
It will be organized by Chris Martin & Coldplay and could take up to 25 minutes. 1 1 132
